description_long: This is a folding pocket knife with a sleek, modern design, featuring a single-edged, straight blade made of dark metal. The blade has a thumb hole near the base for easy one-handed opening and a sharp, pointed tip for precision cutting. The handle is ergonomically curved, constructed from a dark, likely synthetic or metal material, and includes visible fasteners along its length. The knife's profile is slim, and the handle appears to have a lanyard hole at the end for attachment. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, emphasizing portability and compactness. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with no visible decorative elements.
description: A sleek, modern folding pocket knife with a dark, straight-edged blade and a contoured handle. The design is minimalistic and functional, with a thumb hole for easy opening.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, highlighting the straight blade, thumb hole, and contoured handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the knife's slimness.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the blade's sharp tip, thumb hole, and the handle's ergonomic curve.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the knife's thinness and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_design: curved, ergonomic, dark synthetic or metal, smooth, lanyard hole
